creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:
Hi,


I get this when trying to build it:

[00:00:09] ====>> Error: sysutils/iocage depends on nonexistent origin 'devel/py-click at py36'; Please contact maintainer of the port to fix this.


There are actually quite a lot of my python-ports that don't build right now.

Is it a problem with the iocage port or the py-click port?
